Sandbox.//LocalDocker: true = run the broker + sandbox on THIS machine with no worker (full local loop in the README). false = dispatch to a connected remote worker.

hardened.//allowlist: The ONLY hosts the sandbox may reach (through the broker). Include your backend host (the runner dials it over the broker's TLS CONNECT), the git host, package registries, and the model API.

Sandbox.//urls: Broker mode: these MUST be https and their host MUST be in EgressAllowlist above (the runner reaches the backend through the broker's TLS-only CONNECT proxy).
Sandbox.//secrets: Held by the broker on the worker, injected on demand — NEVER seeded into the sandbox. Prefer short-lived, scoped tokens.
